title: Rain Falls on Alabasta
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on the straw hats become wanted heroes. News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Straw Hats Become Wanted Heroes sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: To try and stop my plans...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm launch- ing you off now!

summary: News of Crocodile’s defeat spreads, new bounties and political consequences appear, and the crew prepares to leave Alabasta quietly.
